allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\dungv\\OneDrive - Bao Linh Education\\Claude Cowork\\Projects\\Xây dựng CRM tích LMS\\bled-crm-lms"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" ".\\node_modules\\typescript\\bin\\tsc" --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "STATUS 200 - server OK"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "Chua phan hoi sau 40s" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/families" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; if \($code\) { "REDIRECT/STATUS $code - server OK \(redirect ve /login do chua dang nhap\)"; $ok=$true; break } else { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "Chua phan hoi" })
